from typing import Callable

_registry: dict[str, Callable] = {}


def register(name: str):
    def decorator(func: Callable) -> Callable:
        _registry[name] = func
        return func
    return decorator


@register("user_created")
def handle_user_created(event: dict) -> None:
    print(f"User created: {event['user_id']}")


@register("order_placed")
def handle_order_placed(event: dict) -> None:
    print(f"Order placed: {event['order_id']}")


@register("payment_received")
def handle_payment(event: dict) -> None:
    print(f"Payment received: {event['amount']}")


def process_event(event: dict) -> None:
    handler = _registry.get(event["type"])
    if handler:
        handler(event)
